parameters: I'll go back to my room and sleep.
This seems like the back entrance of the store.
Oh so this is where you were.
Were you about to fall asleep from drinking
too much? Hey, I can't carry you all the
way back, stay awake until we get back!
Let's go home before you collapse.
HEY, I just said to stay awake!
That's what people usually see, right?
Anyway, I'm sleepy too so let's
hurry up and go home, I want to sleep.
↓処女を失ったからナンパイベント消え
ハートの連続吹き出し
screaming in the middle of the night.
Never mind that, I've been searching for you!
Please stop playing around until so late!
Ngh... If the young lady says so...
For now, I have prepared a carriage just
over there. We are heading back immediately.
I guess I have no choice...
Let's chat again some other time.
